response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: N/A. The background music is entirely instrumental, so there are no spoken vocals to match. 2. JSON Usage: Fully analyzed the video structure and used the manual visual-text translation trigger to provide on-screen subtitles for the slides, guidelines, merchandise, and fan messages. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed the visual subtitles to match slide transitions perfectly, ensuring clarity and avoiding clutter.
